title: Gin Is Torn Between Krieg and Sanji
description: On pages 17–19, the fight against Krieg reaches a moral breaking point as Gin, Sanji, Zeff, and Luffy clash over debt, survival, and strength.
scene: Krieg’s weapons and cruelty force everyone at the Baratie to reveal what they truly value: victory, loyalty, survival, or protecting someone else’s dream.

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Allow me to tell you my nickname.

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: I don't have a shred of sympathy for you anymore.
